svg.text: FROM checkpoints JOIN shifts JOIN athletes
GROUP BY athlete_id ORDER BY total_km DESC
200 { shifts: [ { id, distance, duration, avg_speed, started_at } ], avg_distance }
FROM shifts JOIN checkpoints JOIN teams
200 { name, team, total_km, avg_speed, total_shifts } (sem dados sensíveis)
